channel.title: physics.atm-clus updates on arXiv.org
channel.description: physics.atm-clus updates on the arXiv.org e-print archive.

item.title: Reflections on future problems in cluster science
item.description: arXiv:2605.03402v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: This article is a collection of contributions from speakers at the 2025 DEAMN [Dynamics of Electrons in Atomic and Molecular Nanoclusters] workshop at the Majorana Centre in Erice. Not ordinary contributions to a conference proceeding, this gives a new and different perspective on the work done by the workshop participants.
item.dc:creator: K. Hansen, V. V. Kresin, R. Alhyder, M. Lemeshko, M. F\'arn\'ik, J. Fedor, P. Ferrari, L. X. Worutowicz, R. J. Louwerse, D. Kiawi, L. B. F. M. Waters, S. M. Lang, J. M. Bakker, B. v. Issendorff, W. Kong, J. Mehmel, R. Sch\"afer, S. Pedalino, B. E. Ram\'irez-Galindo, R. Ferstl, S. Sindelar, S. Gerlich, M. Arndt, S. G. Sayres, L. -S. Wang
